a:r.a:t: Public-facing portal entry with stats, CTAs & college branding
Secure recruiter sign-up with OTP verification & company profile
Organisation details, social media, turnover & NIRF fields
Head HR + 2 PoCs with landline, designation & character counts
Role, JD, work mode, skills, document upload & expected hires
All IIT (ISM) programmes with CGPA, backlog & gender filters
Full CTC breakup — UG/PG split, currency selector, ESOP/bond
PPT, resume, tests, GD, interviews with duration & infra needs
AIPC agreement, self-declaration, typed signature & preview
